alkylation reagent: adding iodoacetamide to a final concentration of 0.25 M
alkylation concentration: adding iodoacetamide to a final concentration of 0.25 M
cleavage agent: Proteins were then digested in 5% acetonitrile/50 mM ammonium bicarbonate overnight using trypsin
enrichment method: Lysis and enrichment for newly synthesized proteins was done using Click-It Protein Enrichment Kit
fractionation method: or subjected to isoelectric focusing using an OFFGEL fractionator
instrument: ionized using an ESI source on a Q-Exactive, Q-Exactive Plus or a LTQ (linear trap quadrupole) Orbitrap Velos MS
labeling: We demonstrated previously that the Pan virus produces >1000-fold more infectious viral progeny than the non-adapted virus
reduction reagent: Input samples were reduced by adding dithiothreitol (DTT) to a final concentration of 0.1 M
reduction concentration: adding dithiothreitol (DTT) to a final concentration of 0.1 M
